system.flavor: An elementary magic trick originally for entertainment, turned to combat purpose.
system.effect:
Zone create a zone of slippery ice in free space in range.
• Characters that start their turn in the area or voluntarily enter its space for the first time in a turn may choose to save. On a failed save, or if they decline to save, they are pushed to the closest end of the line, or as far as possible (you can choose if a space is equidistant). Foes then become slow.
• You can push any summon you create in the area to either end of the line.
Conserve line by +2.
